Interface OrderController

All Known Implementing Classes:
OrderControllerImpl
public interface OrderController
API contract for Order management and the complete order lifecycle.

All Swagger/OpenAPI annotations live exclusively on this interface. The OrderControllerImpl provides the runtime implementation.

Version:
2.0
Author:
WealthPro Team
